data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a room scan (360 camera view) as part of the proctored exam process. However, the evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the implementation or testing of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the room scan requirement but fails to provide concrete evidence of its execution, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or testing of the room scan requirement (360 camera view).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for room scan implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the room scan requirement.
